subject: (no subject)
body:
My Mom's childhood friend from Ukraine reached out to her - she works for Oleksandr Vilkul (Ukraninan opposition leader), asked if I could help organize the invitation to the Trump inauguration for a high reward.
Shall I find out the details or drop it? Any interest in meeting them at all

I personally don't know Tamara (my Mom's friend) and my Mom hasn't seen her for years
